lines.english: Gauree, First Mehl:
Egotism binds people in bondage, and causes them to wander around lost.
O Nanak, peace is obtained through devotional worship of the Lord. ||8||13||
He did not accept the Lord's Order - he was deluded by doubt. ||1||
Brahma entered the lotus, and searched the nether regions, but he did not find the end of it.
First, Brahma entered the house of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ham har raakhe gurasabad beechaariaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: But I am protected by the Lord; I contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||Pause||
Whoever is created, shall be destroyed by Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaal na chhoddai bin gur kee sevaa |
lines.english: Death cannot be avoided, without serving the Guru.
All the gods and goddesses are enticed by Maya.
That Lord is Imperishable, Invisible and Inscrutable. ||2||
The sultans, emperors and kings shall not remain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਧਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਿਉ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਰਹਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mai dhar naam jiau raakhahu rahanaa |3|
lines.english: My only Support is the Naam, the Name of the Lord; as He keeps me, I survive. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਹੁ ਭੂਲੈ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਹਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: naamahu bhoolai jam kaa dukh sahanaa |
lines.english: Forgetting the Name, they shall endure the pain of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਧਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: mai dhan deejai har amrit naam |4|
lines.english: Grant me, O Lord, the wealth of Your Ambrosial Naam. ||4||
The bankers shall die, after accumulating their wealth and money.
The leaders and kings shall not remain.
none of them shall be able to remain in the world.
The people, rulers, leaders and chiefs
Death is inevitable; it strikes the heads of the false. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਪੈ ਤਾਂ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: ohu guramukh jaapai taan pat hoee |6|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh and meditates on the Lord is honored. ||6||
Only the One Lord, the Truest of the True, is permanent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਜੀ ਤਿਨਹਿ ਸਭ ਗੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin kar saajee tineh sabh goee |
lines.english: He who created and fashioned everything, shall destroy it.
call themselves great; but through their egotism, their bodies are suffering in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਛੋਡੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਧੀਰਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: kaal na chhoddai bin satigur kee dheeraa |7|
lines.english: Death does not spare them, without the Support of the True Guru. ||7||
The Qazis, Shaykhs and Fakeers in religious robes
The trap of Death is hanging over their tongues and eyes.
Death is over their ears, when they hear talk of evil.
Without the Shabad, they are plundered, day and night. ||8||
Death cannot touch those whose hearts are filled with the True Name of the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਜੋਹਿ ਸਕੈ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaal na johi sakai gun gaae |
lines.english: And who sing the Glories of God.
O Nanak, the Gurmukh is absorbed in the Word of the Shabad. ||9||14||
They speak the Truth - not an iota of falsehood.
Gauree, First Mehl:
They remain unattached, in the Sanctuary of the True Lord. ||1||
The Gurmukhs walk in the Way of the Lord's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਸੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਜੋਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach ghar baisai kaal na johai |
lines.english: They dwell in their true home, and Death does not touch them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਉ ਆਵਤ ਜਾਵਤ ਦੁਖੁ ਮੋਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kau aavat jaavat dukh mohai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs come and go, in the pain of emotional attachment. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਮਾਤੇ ਇਹੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਕਹੀਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har ras maate ihu sukh kaheeai |2|
lines.english: One who is imbued with the Lord's sublime essence, is said to experience this peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਸਿ ਸਹਜ ਘਰੁ ਲਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: nij ghar bais sehaj ghar laheeai |
lines.english: Dwelling in the home of your own being within, you shall find the home of intuitive peace.
So, drink deeply of this Nectar, and speak the Unspoken Speech.
Following the Guru's Teachings, one intuitively chants the Name of the True Lord.
Following the Guru's Teachings, one becomes perfectly stable, and never wavers.
Drinking in this Ambrosial Nectar, and churning it, the essential reality is discerned. ||3||
Beholding the True Guru, I have received His Teachings.
I have come to realize the value of understanding my own soul. ||4||
I have offered my mind and body, after searching deep within my own being.
The Naam, the Name of the Immaculate Lord, is the most excellent and sublime food.
The pure swan-souls see the True Light of the Infinite Lord.
Wherever I look, I see the One and Only Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੇਵਾ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: param pad paaeaa sevaa gur charanee |
lines.english: obtains the supreme status, serving at the Guru's Feet.
One who remains pure and unblemished and practices only true deeds,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਚੂਕੀ ਅਹੰ ਭ੍ਰਮਣੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: man te man maaniaa chookee ahan bhramanee |6|
lines.english: The mind is reconciliated with the mind, and the ego's wandering ways come to an end. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਉਣੁ ਕਉਣੁ ਨਹੀ ਤਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ein bidh kaun kaun nahee taariaa |
lines.english: In this way, who - who has not been saved?
The Lord's Praises have saved His Saints and devotees.
